toast.needOneRole: Add at least one role first
toast.teamNeedRoles: Add at least one role under Team → Roles first
toast.needMainLeader: Add a role with id “main” as Team Leader in the role list first
toast.rolesListUpdatedDesc: agents.list[].model written as provider/modelId per OpenClaw; restart Gateway to apply.
toast.agentIdInvalid: Agent ID must start with a letter; only letters, digits, hyphen, underscore; max 63 chars.
toast.restartGwAfterAuth: Auth saved. If Gateway was already running, restart it and try again.
toast.cannotOpenBrowser: Cannot open browser; ensure Gateway is running.

model.noneHint: Add one and enter API Key
model.deleteDesc: Instances using it will fall back to the default model. This cannot be undone.
model.pageSubtitle: Add models and API keys. Agents without a model use the default.
model.apiKeyInvalidHint: Invalid API Key: paste only the vendor key (ASCII), nothing else.

skills.installingViaAgent: Installing via Agent, please wait (~1–2 min)…
skills.installPlaceholder: Skill URL or ID, e.g. https://clawhub.ai/skills/xxx or my-skill
skills.searchPlaceholder: Search skills by name, description, source…
skills.listError: Could not list skills. Ensure OpenClaw CLI works; install via above.
skills.uninstallConfirm: Uninstall skill "{{id}}"? Removes the skill folder from all instances. Cannot undo.
skills.listErrorLead: Could not list skills. Ensure OpenClaw CLI works; install via above (

session.saveNote: Writes session.dmScope=main and session.reset with mode=idle and a very large idleMinutes (~10 years). OpenClaw often only allows daily|idle for reset.mode, so we use an extreme idle window instead of mode=off.
session.warning: Multiple users share context; very long chats may still compress on the model side.

reset.off: Default (no explicit reset; includes official idle expiry)
reset.never: Effectively no idle rotation (idle + very long minutes)

role.displayNameTitle: Display name; if empty, same as role id below.

team.pondTeamHint: After enabling team space, writes skills/pond-team/SKILL.md in this instance for collaboration.
team.enableNeedRoles: Add at least one role under Team → Roles first.
team.noTasks: No tasks; add in the task board.
team.dashboardHint: pond-team: after enabling team space, writes skills/pond-team/SKILL.md for collaboration.
team.heartbeatInject: When light heartbeat context is on, only HEARTBEAT.md is injected (see Heartbeat).

task.emptyHint: No tasks; add a title and assignee
task.failReasonPlaceholder: e.g. blocked dependency, unclear acceptance, permission issue
task.boardSubtitle: Member activity and task status; completion updates with Done.
task.needRolesForAssign: Add roles under Team → Roles before assigning.
task.enableSpaceFirst: Enable team space in Overview first, then manage tasks here.
task.failDialogDesc: Enter a reason; Leader (main) will be notified.

activity.title: Member activity
activity.startGateway: Start Gateway to see per-role activity

heartbeat.toPlaceholder: Channel id, e.g. phone or session id
heartbeat.inheritHint: Leave empty and save to remove this role’s heartbeat; inherits global default.

workspace.pickFileLeft: Pick a file on the left

browser.colorHint: Title bar color for managed browser window.
browser.attachOnlyHint: Do not launch; attach to existing Chrome with remote debugging.

empty.noInstance: Use the instance switcher in the sidebar to select or add an instance.
empty.instanceHint: The current instance is controlled globally; settings here apply to the selected instance.

history.noChats: No chats for this instance yet; talk in Chat to see them here.

leader.titleFixed: Team Leader id is fixed to “{{id}}”

addRole.title: Add role
addRole.desc: Add a role and pick its model.
addRole.idHint: Starts with a letter; letters, digits, hyphen, underscore; up to 63 chars.

deleteRole.title: Delete role “{{id}}”?
deleteRole.desc: Removes from agents.list for this instance; Pond team view updates. Keep at least one role. Restart Gateway and check bindings. Back up ~/.openclaw-* if needed.

cron.empty: No cron jobs; ask the Agent in chat to create one.

deleteInstance.title: Delete instance
deleteInstance.confirm: Delete “{{name}}”? Removes OpenClaw data, channels, and chat history. Cannot undo.
